text: The stark, geometric hallway in the first scene feels strangely empty, almost liminal. I am reminded of thresholds—spaces of neither arrival nor departure, but of waiting potential. Moving into the bright, colorful exhibition in the second scene, my mind stirs with curiosity. This place celebrates inquiry, innovation, and the meeting of minds and machines. Surrounded by words and ideas, I feel intellectually awakened, sensing that I am part of a wider conversation about the shape of tomorrow.
